headline: Forced disappearance of Pastor Koh enters 8th year
context: The enforced disappearance of Pastor Raymond Koh in February 2017 remained unsolved in 2025 despite Suhakam's finding of police involvement.

cards.big: Pastor Raymond Koh disappeared 8 years ago, Suhakam implicated Special Branch
cards.sub: Government has not acted on Suhakam's 2019 inquiry findings

cards.big: Suhakam inquiry concluded in 2019 that police were involved in Koh's abduction
cards.sub: No prosecution initiated despite findings of state involvement

cards.big: International Convention on Enforced Disappearances not ratified by Malaysia
cards.sub: No domestic law specifically addresses enforced disappearances

cards.big: Koh's family has spent 8 years and over RM500,000 seeking accountability
cards.sub: Amri Che Mat and Joshua Hilmy also remain missing since 2016

cards.big: When the state ignores its own findings, impunity becomes policy
Susanna Liew filed fresh legal proceedings against government in March 2025
